title: D4.1 - Selection procedure and Onboarding criteria for AgrifoodTEF customers
author: Giaffreda, Raffaele
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document describes the Onboarding Procedures to be followed in AgrifoodTEF to enable the provision of services. The step-by-step procedure is meant to assist Consortium Members in the process of assessing whether a third-party organisation, external to the project, satisfies the requirements for accessing an AgrifoodTEF service. This results in the selection of candidate customers being regulated by clear rules.
steps_raw: This document describes the Onboarding Procedures to be followed in AgrifoodTEF to enable the provision of services. The step-by-step procedure is meant to assist Consortium Members in the process of assessing whether a third-party organisation, external to the project, satisfies the requirements for accessing an AgrifoodTEF service. This results in the selection of candidate customers being regulated by clear rules.
